summary: Capacitor Native Wrapper Setup Test Complete - Backend: 23/23 passed (100%), Frontend: All flows verified. Push token storage, RevenueCat config/offerings/restore endpoints, Capacitor config, native bridge, service worker registration, App.js native initialization all working. Native camera button correctly hidden on web (isNative()=false). All regression tests passed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Capacitor native wrapper features verified

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Capacitor native wrapper setup fully tested. Native bridge uses dynamic imports so Capacitor plugins don't break in web mode (isNative() returns false on web). The 'Take Photo' button on Memory Vault only shows when isNative() is true. Push token storage saves to user's push_tokens array. RevenueCat endpoints are configured with bundle_id=com.ubuntumarket.kindred.

push_token_storage: POST /api/auth/push-token saves device token to user's push_tokens array
Returns ok=false if push_token is empty
revenuecat_config: Returns tier_mapping with seedling, sapling, oak, redwood, elder_grove, premium
revenuecat_restore: Returns restored, tier, status, entitlements fields
capacitor_config: Plugin settings for SplashScreen, StatusBar, PushNotifications, Keyboard
native_bridge: native-bridge.js exports isNative (returns false on web)
exports hapticLight, hapticMedium, hapticSuccess (no-ops on web)
Dynamic imports prevent Capacitor errors on web
app_js_native_init: App.js imports configureStatusBar, registerPush, setupAppListeners, isNative
useEffect calls native initialization when isNative() is true
frontend_no_capacitor_errors: Page loads without Capacitor import errors
native_camera_hidden_on_web: Take Photo button (data-testid='memories-native-camera') NOT visible on web
isNative() correctly returns false on web
regression: Gatherings page loads with event templates
Kinship Map loads with 5 people, 3 connections
Subscription page loads with pricing tiers and Add-ons section

notes.native_features_on_web: Native Capacitor APIs are no-ops on web by design - isNative() returns false, all native functions gracefully return without action
notes.native_camera_button: The Take Photo button (data-testid='memories-native-camera') only renders when isNative() returns true, so it won't appear in browser testing - verified correctly hidden
notes.revenuecat_subscriber: RevenueCat offerings/restore may return error if subscriber doesn't exist in RevenueCat dashboard - this is expected behavior
